input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.9.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.9.4.2
            TITLE: the inertia switch must be:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.9.4.2: The Inertia Switch must be:
T.9.4.2 The Inertia Switch must be: 
a. A Sensata Resettable Crash Sensor or equivalent  
b. Mechanically and rigidly attached to the vehicle 
c. Removable to test functionality

final_answer: T.9.4.2 The Inertia Switch must be: a. A Sensata Resettable Crash Sensor or equivalent b. Mechanically and rigidly attached to the vehicle c. Removable to test functionality
